name: sigah
description: SIGAH - Humanitarian Aid Management System for Monteria (monolith)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && pnpm run db:up
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm --prefix server exec prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:seed: pnpm --prefix server exec prisma db seed
